task_description: Phase 2.5 Gameplay Enhancement Layer for Plague of Danjin. Implements 10 interconnected systems: Items & Equipment, Elemental System, Skills & Cooldowns, Status Effects, Enemy Telegraph, New Enemy Types, Event Rooms, Run Modifiers, Extended Events, and CombatEngine Integration.

verification.summary: All class files compile cleanly. No System.in/out/err in model or controller. Review fix pass applied: all 9 issues from 2026-07-17-121727-review.md resolved. Shield Bash applies STUN, Drain Life has lifesteal, Assassinate is conditional, Blood Pact costs HP, Divine Shield applies 2-hit SHIELD, Berserker Rage uses ENRAGE status, Resurrection sets auto-revive, BoneColossus reflect deals 20 damage, PlagueGoblin checks poison immunity.
